Quarter: The quarter of the year in which the data was collected.
Year: The year in which the data was collected.
Company: The name of the company that collected the data.
Avg_Data_Points_Per_Module: The average number of performance data points collected per battery module by the company's lifecycle system through its digital twin integration.
Data_Point_Type_Covered: The types of performance data points that were collected, such as voltage, temperature, and charge-discharge rates.
